brief.headline: Chaos Intelligence v7 — Initializing
brief.eli5: The system is warming up. First full brief will appear once the n8n workflow runs. All data sources are being connected.
brief.analyst: Chaos Intelligence v7 is initializing. The workflow will push live market data and AI-generated analysis to this endpoint on every scheduled run.
brief.quant: System boot sequence in progress. Awaiting first workflow execution to populate live market data and AI analysis across all nine macro force vectors.
brief.chaos_line: The engine is cold. The markets are not.

plays.details: System is initializing. Full plays will be generated on the next n8n run.
Watch this space. AI analysis loading...
The best trades happen when no one is watching.

brief.trap: Retail is waiting for the perfect signal. The perfect signal never comes. The market moves while you wait.
brief.edge: Watch the bond market. It tells the truth before equities do.
